venues.name: Frevo
venues.description: One of NYC's most talked-about 2026 openings. Already Michelin-starred, Frevo is a Greenwich Village tasting room built for guests who treat dinner as the main event.

venues.name: The Eighty Six
venues.atmosphere: Hot new West Village dinner room
venues.description: 86 Bedford St — one of the most talked-about West Village openings of 2026. A composed dinner room with a late lounge pulse that keeps the right crowd through the evening.

venues.name: 10Cubed
venues.description: 217 West 57th St, 100 floors above Manhattan. Panoramic Central Park views, private dining rooms, a cigar lounge, and an intimate nightclub — built for nights that need to be remembered.

venues.name: Rooftop Social Club

venues.name: The DL
venues.description: An iconic LES three-level venue with NYC's best retractable rooftop, a private DJ lounge on the second floor, and Le Jardin Bistro for French-inspired dinner on the first. One venue, full night.

venues.name: Little Sister Lounge
venues.description: Tucked beneath the Moxy East Village — jewel-toned interiors, low ceilings, intimate corners, and a crowd that dresses like the night matters. The right room after dinner anywhere downtown.
